title: 7 Herbal Teas For Menstrual Cramps
description: Ginkgo biloba teas contains flavonoids and terpenoids as its bioactive constituents, which work together to ease menstrual cramps. Flavonoids like quercetin and kaempferol help relax the uterine muscles, reducing spasms and discomfort. Terpenoids, specifically ginkgolides and bilobalide, have anti-inflammatory properties that reduce prostaglandins, hormone-like substances responsible for menstrual cramps. These compounds also improve blood flow to the uterus, which may help reduce cram...
